authors.author: Unbekannt
Spiritual
Ich bin schwach, doch du bist stark

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus will walk with me Jesus will walk with me Down through the valley Jesus will walk with me over the plain When in the shadow or when in the sunshine I know He will walk with me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus will walk with me And He will talk with me Jesus will walk with me Talk with me still In joy or sorrow, today or tomorrow I know He will walk with me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus will walk with me When I am tempted Giving me Strength As my need may demand When in affliction His Presence is near me I am held in His Mighty Hand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus will walk with me Guarding me, keeping me Giving me victory over my sins He is my Comfort, my Counsel, my Leader And so I will walk with Him
